acceptance_targets: [chapter_01_craft_001] Pass if the revised stretch around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:107 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:185 gives each stage of the route a visible leverage shift or physical action on the page, and no run of more than two consecutive speaking turns functions only as explanation. Fail if the passage still reads as a single uninterrupted rules briefing.

[chapter_01_dialogue_001] Pass if each cited exchange can be read aloud without mentally supplying a missing subject or auxiliary, while Riva, Tovin, and Lale still sound like themselves. Fail if any revised line still depends on omitted function words for terseness.

[chapter_01_prose_001] Pass if, across the revised cited beats, no more than two impact sentences begin with "That" and immediately explain the effect, and at least three of those moments now land through visible action, sensation, or charged silence on the page. Fail if the same summary construction still dominates the chapter's payoff beats.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised stretch around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:107 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:185 gives each stage of the route a visible leverage shift or physical action on the page, and no run of more than two consecutive speaking turns functions only as explanation. Fail if the passage still reads as a single uninterrupted rules briefing.
findings.problem: The middle scene explains the whole five-cut architecture in one sustained briefing, so embodied pressure gives way to procedural explanation at the point where the chapter should keep discovery hot. Tovin stays active, but the siblings too often exist to ask setup questions rather than force costly choices.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the briefing across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:107, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:115, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:165, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:185 so each cut's rule arrives through a concrete task, objection, or immediate consequence in the room. Let at least two sibling interruptions materially change what Tovin reveals next or what gets prepared, instead of having her list the route straight through.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if each cited exchange can be read aloud without mentally supplying a missing subject or auxiliary, while Riva, Tovin, and Lale still sound like themselves. Fail if any revised line still depends on omitted function words for terseness.
findings.problem: Several pressure beats collapse into clipped written fragments rather than lived speech: "Opens how.", "Cut him loose?", and "Walking where?" all rely on omitted function words to sound terse. That stylization cuts against the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping and slightly undercuts the otherwise strong idiolect separation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exchanges at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:281 so the same urgency comes through colloquial complete speech or clearly natural fragments. Keep the speakers' contraction-heavy registers, but remove subject or auxiliary elision that reads authored rather than spoken.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, across the revised cited beats, no more than two impact sentences begin with "That" and immediately explain the effect, and at least three of those moments now land through visible action, sensation, or charged silence on the page. Fail if the same summary construction still dominates the chapter's payoff beats.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly lands blows with the same explanatory sentence shape: a short "That ..." impact summary after a reveal or line of dialogue. Because it appears well over twice, the pattern stops reading as controlled emphasis and starts reading as a default landing gear, flattening several otherwise strong beats.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the payoff sentences at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:129, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:177, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:299, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:325, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:355. Replace at least some of those explanatory "That" sentences with bodily reaction, silence, changed action, or a different sentence rhythm so the impact lands through scene texture instead of narrator summary.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
